summary: Release 4.6 · BC Refinement Batch 1 (R1 split-address + offline PDFs + R2 Subhead from Tally chain) — full backend + frontend regression. 14/14 NEW live HTTP tests pass (test_bc_release_4_6_live.py), 10/10 unit tests pass (test_bc_release_4_6_address_offline_subhead.py), and pre-existing 26/26 R4.5 collapse tests still pass — total 50/50 green. Frontend: BC Workbench shows the new 'Offline PDFs' button alongside Send Selected / Send Reminder / Send All in View; disabled→enabled toggle works; click triggers ZIP download with PDF entries (verified .zip filename + %PDF magic + 1 entry / 2941B). Subhead Coverage Heatmap renders with column header 'Subhead' and SUBHEAD column added to Workbench table. No console/page errors on any BC view.

verified.csv_import_split_address_persists: POST import.csv with address_line_1/2/city/pincode → 200; subsequent GET /ledgers shows '12 MG Road' / Pune / 411001 / TEST_qa@x.in persisted.
verified.csv_import_legacy_backward_compat: POST import.csv with single 'address' column → status <500 (graceful accept).
verified.offline_pdfs_zip: POST /runs/{rid}/offline-pdfs with 3 ledger_ids → 200, Content-Type=application/zip, Content-Disposition=attachment; filename=BalanceConfirmation_OfflineLetters_*.zip. Each entry starts with %PDF and >=2KB.
verified.analytics_subheads_shape: GET /analytics returns subheads array; each row carries subhead, head, parent_group, count, amount, audit_amount_pct, response_amount_pct.
verified.subhead_old_run_fallback: Pre-R2-ingested run still has head='' and subhead==parent_group — frontend correctly falls back via `r.subhead || r.parent_group`. Re-ingest required to populate proper Schedule III subheads (documented in agent context).
verified.regression_r45_collapse: 26/26 R4.5 live + extras tests pass — chain-redirect for multi-hop archived→canonical confirmed.
verified.regression_pre_existing_bc: list_runs / list_ledgers / get_run / generations envelope endpoints all 200 OK on the seeded run.
verified.frontend_offline_pdfs_button: data-testid='bc-download-offline-pdfs' present in Workbench bulk-action bar (4 buttons, in spec order: Send Selected · Send Reminder · Send All in View · Offline PDFs). Disabled with 0 selection, enabled at >=1.
verified.frontend_zip_download: Click triggers Playwright download event → filename ends with .zip → ZIP opens cleanly with %PDF entries.
verified.frontend_subhead_heatmap: data-testid='bc-subhead-heatmap' present on Dashboard tab; column header reads 'Subhead'; first cell shows label without grey 'head' suffix because old run lacks head (expected).
verified.frontend_workbench_subhead_column: Workbench table now exposes a 'SUBHEAD' column populated for every row (e.g. 'Designs Kokeva', 'Apparel Hpa & Bros', 'Direct-2').
verified.no_console_errors: Zero console errors / page errors on Dashboard view AND Workbench view of the BC working-doc page.

action_items: [Optional] Re-ingest the seeded ABC Textile Mills BC run (rid 7de985da-…) so head/subhead are backfilled from the Tally chain — currently subhead==parent_group on this old run (e.g. 'Designs Kokeva' instead of 'Sundry Debtors'). The fallback works correctly so this is data-only, not a code defect.
critical_code_review_comments: controller.py @ /runs/{rid}/offline-pdfs — clean: 404 before 400 for missing run, 400 before fetch for empty ledger_ids, 404 after fetch for no-match. Auto-pull of auditor letterhead from `user` and client info from clients collection is implemented as spec requires; falls back to demo values if user fields are absent (acceptable).
service.py EMAIL_CSV_COLUMNS — 19 columns, properly drops legacy 'address'. import_email_csv is backward-compat (legacy 'address' csv parses without 5xx via _split_address heuristic).

classifier.compute_head_subhead — walks the chain to first PRIMARY group; final fallback returns last link as best-effort head with empty subhead (handled in test_subhead_unmapped_chain_returns_blank).
offline_pdf.build_offline_letters_zip — generates ReportLab PDFs with cover letter + 2-way tear-off slip; verified PDF magic header + multi-KB size in unit test.
SummaryDashboard.jsx label rule `r.subhead || r.parent_group || '—'` plus optional grey `· head` suffix is correct; degrades gracefully for pre-R2 runs.
Landing.jsx bulk-action bar order matches spec exactly; Offline PDFs button is conditional on `selected.size && !busy`.
Minor: server doesn't seem to validate that ledger_ids is a list of strings — if frontend ever sends [null] it would attempt $in:[null] and 404 on no-match. Low risk.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bc_release_4_6_live.py (NEW — 14 live HTTP tests, 4 classes, ABC Textile Mills client + first BC run as fixture)

success_rate.frontend_bc_offline_pdfs_flow: 100% (button visible / disabled / enabled / ZIP download / contents valid)

seed_data_creation: No new fixtures created — used existing seeded client cli_ad137f29aebb (ABC Textile Mills) and BC run 7de985da-3fad-4541-ac8f-525246aadb62.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) test_bc_release_4_6_live.py is the regression suite for Release 4.6 — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://unified-tax-tools.preview.emergentagent.com. It uses the QA bypass cookie + ABC Textile Mills client. 2) The seeded run (7de985da-…) was ingested before R2, so its rows still have head='' and subhead==parent_group. To verify the *full* heatmap label format ('Subhead · Head' grey suffix) end-to-end, re-ingest the run (POST /runs/{rid}/upload-books) or create a fresh run. 3) BC Landing now has TWO sub-views: Dashboard (default — contains SummaryDashboard incl. Subhead heatmap) and Workbench (table — contains Offline PDFs button). 4) Verified ZIP integrity directly: 1 entry × ~3KB, starts with %PDF.
